recent_projects.name: aquiles-rag
recent_projects.summary: Aquiles-RAG is a high-performance Augmented Recovery-Generation (RAG) solution based on Redis, Qdrant or PostgreSQLRAG. It offers a high-level interface using FastAPI REST APIs.

recent_projects.name: smartystreets-python-sdk
recent_projects.summary: An official library to help Python developers easily access the SmartyStreets APIs
recent_projects.author: SmartyStreets SDK Team
